description:
Beanie fleece, polar fleece

PREMIUM QUALITY FABRIC: Baby blankets are made of durable, breathable, skin-friendly plush fabric that is more suitable for the baby's delicate skin. Each toddler blanket features a double-layer design with a dotted backing that your child will love. It is thick enough for all seasons and climates to make your little one warm and comfortable.

PERFECT HOME DECORATION: Bright vibrant colors, showing a fresh and elegant temperament and making it the perfect addition to your kid's bed. Giving your baby a dreamy atmosphere.

VERSATILE USAGE SCENARIOS: This baby blanket for girls and boys comes in 75*100cm and is perfect for sleeping, stroller cover, nursing cover, and burp Cloth. Also great for fur babies or adults, covers your legs in the office、living room, or traveling outside with the perfect finishing touch.

IDEAL BABY SHOWER GIFT: The infant blanket is not only breathable but lightweight so that your baby won’t get hot or sweat like a quilt or comforter does in summer and be warm enough for winter use.

EASY CARE INSTRUCTIONS: You can wash by hand or gentle machine wash without worrying about shrinkage, hair loss, changing the dots embossing quality, etc.

Size: 30x40inch/75x100cm
